--- Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 16
REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.

--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
REASONING: Multiattack on Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration (3 attacks).
ACTION: Multiattack (3× Bite) on Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration
→ Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 16] HIT! 13 damage. Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration HP: 54/67
→ Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 16] HIT! 18 damage. Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration HP: 36/67
→ Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 16] HIT! 17 damage. Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration HP: 19/67
══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Thri-kreen — Iron Concentration --- HP: 19/67 | AC: 16
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Young Red Dragon (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:17+4=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
--- Young Red Dragon --- HP: 178/178 | AC: 18
